questionHtml:
The energy levels for an atom are shown to scale.

A photon of wavelength λ is emitted because of a transition from E3 to E2. Which transition leads to the emission of a photon of longer wavelength?

A. E4 to E1

B. E4 to E3

C. E3 to E1

D. E2 to E1
